title: Notification No.94/2016-Cus(NT), dated 1.7.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 94/ 2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 1st July, 2016 S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints officer mentioned in column (5) of the table below to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise powers and discharge duties conferred on officer mentioned in column (4) of the table in respect of noticee mentioned in column (2) of the table for purpose of adjudication of show cause notice mentioned column (3) of the table, namely:- Table [F.No. 437/78/2015-CusIV] ` (Z.R.Kamili) Director (Customs) Sl. No Names of the Noticee Show Cause Notice No. and date Answerable to Common Adjudicating Authority (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) 1. M/s Pace International and others F.No.VIII/ICD/6/Adj/Commr /58/2011/21850-21886 dated 25.07.2011 Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tuglakabad, New Delhi Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot Patparganj and other Inland Container Depots, Delhi. -- 1 of 1 --
